steady_equation.strength_term: A_steady = mix(A_reinforce, S_reinforce_score, S_amp_score, M_brain_direct_v18, R_train_v24)
steady_equation.learning_term: L_steady = mix(L_reinforce, L_amp, D_feature_v18, B_plastic_v24, R_train_v24)
steady_equation.system_term: M_steady = A_steady + S_steady + R_steady + L_steady + R_steady_sys - P_steady
